properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v1 v4 v1 v5 v1

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jesus is a soul man, Jesus is a soul man, Jesus Is a soul man, And I’m surely sold on Him.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: People say that He is a square, Jesus, He is nowhere, I know better cos He lives in my heart Jesus is a soul man.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You can find Him in the Bible pages, Jesus, He’s the Rock of Ages The pathway, the cleft of the Rock Jesus is a soul man.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: He calms the sea, When the storm is raging He keeps me free when the devil is raging He is my staff, my shield and my sword Jesus is a soul man.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Shadrack, Meshack and Abednego The King said, in the fire they must go, They found out that the fire wouldn’ burn them They were saved by the soul man.
